info.title: dotnet-gtests
info.description: A global .NET Core tool that helps to generate tests classes based on project file

options.name: --source-project
options.description: The project file where the classes will be searched to generate tests.

options.name: --gmethods
options.description: Public methods must be included in the test class. (default true).

options.name: --output-dir
options.description: The ouput folder where be add tests classes, relative to <PROJECT>. (default is root on <PROJECT>)

arguments.name: PROJECT
arguments.description: The project file to operate on, where be add tests classes. If a file is not specified, the command will search the current directory for one.
